subcategory: WebGL plasma shader visualization with mouse interaction
use_cases: Interactive hero section background with cosmic plasma effect for landing pages
Immersive canvas background for media or portfolio websites
Animated visual element for creative tool interfaces
WebGL-powered background for SaaS product pages
Dynamic plasma visualization for interactive storytelling experiences
ai_summary: A WebGL-based cosmic plasma visualization using OGL renderer with custom GLSL shaders. Features dynamic color shifting via HSV-to-RGB conversion, fractal Brownian motion noise, and curl effects creating organic fluid animations. Includes mouse attraction controls, configurable glow intensity, saturation, and energy flow parameters. Renders animated plasma textures with multiple layers and time-based animation, optimized for hero sections and immersive backgrounds.
